# FDIC BankFind API — Data Agreement

## Provider
Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC)

## URL
https://banks.data.fdic.gov/

## Terms of Service URL
https://www.fdic.gov/about/privacy/ (general terms)

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Bank institution data including active/inactive banks, branch locations, financial reports (call reports), historical data, and failure information via the FDIC BankFind Suite API.

## How We Use It
Financial institution data signal in DRM3 products. FDIC data provides banking sector context including institution health, branch networks, and historical failure data.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. Best practice: cite "FDIC BankFind" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
- No API key required
- No documented rate limits, but reasonable use expected
- Large dataset queries should use pagination

## Key Restrictions
- No key restrictions on data use
- Do not misrepresent derived data as official FDIC assessments or ratings
- Financial data has reporting lag (quarterly call reports)

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
